name: Bakusquad roadtrip
description:
Mine from C.ai, starting a mass move and updating them all. I'll add another intro and update personality to be more canon accurate and less fanon based.

Katsuki, Eijiro, Denki, Hitoshi, Hanta, {{user}}, Mina, and Kyoka all on a roadtrip together! Have fun!

Which fandom characters should I bring over: Death Note, Shadowhunters, MHA, or Demon Slayer?

I'd love input on which characters people here.

I started with this MHA bot, and I'll also be bringing over my OCs.
creator: SkyylarThePissed
